name: Score My Reviews
description:
What does Score My Review Does?

The tool focuses on soliciting new reviews. It's user-friendly and allows you to guide your customers to any review platform you prefer.

‍

Features:

  • Easily log in from any device to initiate review requests by entering customer details or uploading a spreadsheet.
  • Automated, branded SMS and email requests are sent to customers to gather feedback on their experience.
  • Guide customers to leave reviews on your preferred platforms like Google and Facebook.
  • Option to direct customers to a private feedback form instead of public review sites.
  • Embed code provided to showcase positive reviews from multiple sources directly on your website.
  • Branded microsite available to display your business profile and ratings across various review platforms.
  • Comprehensive reporting dashboard provides detailed insights into review data, ratings, and performance metrics.

Benefits

  • Simplify the process of requesting reviews, whether for individual customers or in bulk.
  • Drive more reviews through automated outreach across multiple communication channels.
  • Focus on collecting reviews on key listing sites to enhance your business visibility.
  • Address customer concerns privately with the feedback form, minimizing negative public feedback.
  • Build credibility and increase conversions by highlighting positive customer feedback from trusted sources.
  • Present a unified branded destination that showcases your online reputation effectively.
  • Gain valuable insights from the reporting dashboard to refine your review management strategy.

Pros

✅ works for social media sites as well

Cons

❌ The tool does not have the option to respond to reviews

Priced at $49 Per Month
